title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
